2606.16661.title: SCAR: Semantic Continuity-Aware Retrieval for Efficient Context Expansion in RAG
2606.16661.paper_summary: Fixed-length chunking in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) often leads to boundary fragmentation, where critical evidence is split across segments, degrading retrieval recall. While static windowing and parent retrieval improve recall, they introduce significant token overhead. We propose SCAR (Semantic Continuity-Aware Retrieval), an adaptive retrieval policy that selectively expands neighboring chunks by weighing query-neighbor relevance against a structural continuity penalty. SCAR uses a relative expansion threshold tied to each retrieved chunk's own query-relevance, yielding an approximately scale-invariant decision rule that transfers across embedding models without recalibration. Across four diverse corpora (RFC, GDPR, a 10-K report, and a Merger agreement; N=320 queries; 160 boundary-fragmented), SCAR achieves 92.8% recall on boundary-fragmented queries with only 7.84 chunks, a 22.9% reduction compared to static windowing (10.16 chunks). Paired bootstrap tests (B=10,000) confirm the chunk reduction is highly significant (p<0.0001, Cohen's d=-1.49, large effect), with a small recall difference (Cohen's d=-0.33). The policy transfers across three embedding models (text-embedding-3-large, BGE-large-en-v1.5, zembed-1) using the same single hyperparameter setting, and downstream RAGAS evaluation on the 10-K corpus confirms SCAR preserves generation faithfulness while reducing context tokens by 27.1%.
2606.16661.paper_summary_zh: 固定長度的分塊在檢索增強生成（RAG）中常常導致邊界碎片化，關鍵證據被分割在不同的段落中，降低了檢索的召回率。雖然靜態窗口和父檢索改善了召回率，但它們引入了顯著的標記開銷。我們提出了SCAR（語義連續性感知檢索），這是一種自適應檢索策略，通過權衡查詢-鄰近相關性與結構連續性懲罰來選擇性地擴展相鄰的分塊。SCAR使用與每個檢索到的分塊自身查詢相關性相關的相對擴展閾值，產生一個近似於尺度不變的決策規則，能夠在不同的嵌入模型之間轉移而無需重新校準。在四個不同的語料庫（RFC、GDPR、一份10-K報告和一份合併協議；N=320個查詢；160個邊界碎片化的查詢）中，SCAR在邊界碎片化查詢上達到了92.8%的召回率，僅使用7.84個分塊，比靜態窗口（10.16個分塊）減少了22.9%。配對自助檢驗（B=10,000）確認分塊減少是非常顯著的（p<0.0001，Cohen's d=-1.49，大效應），而召回率的差異較小（Cohen's d=-0.33）。該策略在三個嵌入模型（text-embedding-3-large、BGE-large-en-v1.5、zembed-1）之間轉移，使用相同的單一超參數設置，而下游的RAGAS評估在10-K語料庫上確認SCAR在減少上下文標記27.1%的同時保持了生成的真實性。
2606.16661.author: Nathanaël Langlois et.al.
